title: Long Modern Media Console
summary: A 72"-wide edge-banded plywood console with a hidden center divider, an exposed open shelf, two inset-hinge cabinet doors, and a minimal 1x2 base — or hairpin legs, if preferred.
description:
The carcass is built from wide-ripped plywood — a top and bottom, three sides/dividers, and a mix of hidden and exposed shelves — with **matching edge banding ironed onto every visible front edge** for a clean, seamless modern look instead of raw plywood edges. This is a different construction language from this catalog's board-and-batten or shiplap media pieces: no applied trim battens, just banded plywood edges and flat cabinet doors.

One shelf stays exposed as open storage, while the hidden divider and hidden shelves sit behind the two doors — build the hidden compartment first, since it's easier to work inside an open carcass before the doors go on. The two doors are simple 1x6 plank-style panels hung on concealed euro-style inset hinges, which keep the front face uninterrupted by visible hardware.

**The base is a plain 1x2 frame, but hairpin legs or another metal base work equally well** if that's the look wanted instead — the plan explicitly treats the base as swappable. A full plywood back closes the carcass in.

materials.name: 3/4" plywood, ripped to 15-3/4" strips, 4x8 sheet (hardwood veneer for painted or stained finish)
Primer and paint, or stain and poly

cutList.note: Assembled in sets of three per door.

steps.title: Build the carcass
steps.body: Assemble the top, bottom, sides, hidden divider, exposed shelf, and hidden shelves into the console carcass.
materials: 3/4" plywood, ripped to 15-3/4" strips, 4x8 sheet (hardwood veneer for painted or stained finish)

steps.title: Edge band the visible edges
steps.body: Iron matching edge banding onto every visible front edge of the carcass.

steps.title: Attach the back
steps.body: Nail or staple the plywood back panel to the carcass.

steps.title: Build the base
steps.body: Assemble the 1x2 base frame (or substitute hairpin legs) and attach it under the carcass.

steps.title: Build and hang the doors
steps.body: Assemble each door from three 1x6 boards, edge band the visible edges, then hang on euro-style inset hinges.

steps.title: Add hardware and finish
steps.body: Attach knobs or handles, then sand and apply primer and paint, or stain and poly.
materials: Primer and paint, or stain and poly

unresolvedImages.alt: Long modern media console with edge banded plywood and plank doors
